title: Italian-Style Garlic Delight
description: A simple Italian-inspired dish featuring roasted garlic and herbs.
instructions: Peel the garlic cloves and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the garlic and sprinkle with salt.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the garlic is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
Mince the roasted garlic and mix with chopped parsley and lemon juice.
